tooltips.nodeCount: Total number of intersections and endpoints in the road network
tooltips.edgeCount: Total number of road segments connecting nodes
tooltips.avgDegree: Average number of connections per node
tooltips.diameterMeters: Length of the longest shortest path between any two nodes
tooltips.radiusMeters: Minimum eccentricity — distance from the most central node to all others
tooltips.clusteringCoefficient: How tightly nodes cluster together (0 = none, 1 = fully clustered)
tooltips.avgEdgeLengthMeters: Average length of road segments in meters
tooltips.nodeDensityPerKm2: Number of nodes per square kilometer
tooltips.connected: Whether all nodes are reachable from each other
tooltips.avgBetweennessCentrality: Average fraction of shortest paths that pass through each node

adminUsers.title: User Management
adminUsers.name: Name
adminUsers.errorGeneric: An error occurred. Please try again.

registerUser.title: Register New User
registerUser.name: Name
registerUser.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
registerUser.errorEmailExists: A user with this email already exists

place.title: Compute Placing Charging Stations
place.kDominatingSet: K (number of stations for each coordinate)

tooltips.maxSpeedKmh: GPS points with speed (location/time) above this threshold are treated as outliers and removed during preprocessing
tooltips.h3DedupResolution: H3 hexagon resolution for merging nearby nodes (0 = coarse, 15 = fine). Higher values preserve more road detail.
tooltips.chooseFile: Select a GPX, JSON, or GeoJSON file containing GPS trajectory data
tooltips.strategy: Algorithm used to determine optimal charging station locations
tooltips.kDominatingSet: Number of charging stations to cover each point
tooltips.maxRadiusMeters: Coverage radius of a single charging station in meters — nodes within this distance are considered covered
tooltips.iterations: Number of independent restarts — more iterations improve solution quality at the cost of computation time (Random and GRASP strategies)
